HI, MY NAME IS ISRAEL!

software developer

computer science and cognitive science at uc berkeley

  • LinkedIn
  • Github
  • Resume

ABOUT ME

Welcome! My name is Israel Rodriguez. I recently graduated from the University of California, Berkeley with a bachelor's degree in Cognitive Science and a minor in Computer Science. I am looking to maximize my acquired skills and experience by applying them in the creation of memorable user experiences and powerful software solutions.

PROJECTS

FINSTAGRAM

A mock front-end for an Instagram-style profile page. It contains a lightbox feature written using only vanilla Javascript that spotlights a clicked image alongside a caption.

technologies used:

HTML, CSS, Javascript, Netlify


LOADING GALLERY

A small site showcasing a number of loading animations I built using only CSS.

technologies used:

HTML, CSS, Netlify


BCOURSES CLONE

A static clone of the home page for the student portal used by UC Berkeley students and staff. This project combines CSS Flexbox, media queries, and pseudoselectors in order to mimic the design and responsiveness of a typical Canvas-powered page.

technologies used:

HTML, CSS, Netlify


GITLET

A simpler version of the version control system Git written in Java. It supports a number of Git commands, including initializing a repository, creating commits, and merging branches.

technologies used:

Java, SHA-1 Hashing, I/O Byte Streams


LINES OF ACTION

A Java implementation of Lines of Action, a board game where the player's goal is to get all of their pieces together in one contiguous block. This game features an AI agent that operates via minimax with alpha-beta pruning.

technologies used:

Java, Minimax Algorithm w/ Pruning, AI Heuristics


NUMC

NumC is a matrix operations library for Python powered by C via the Python/C API. This project incorporates data-level parallelism and thread-level parallelism to achieve significant performance increase for heavy matrix computations.

technologies used:

C, Python, OpenMP Library, AVX Intrinsics, Python/C API


SCHEME INTERPRETER

An interpreter for the programming language Scheme, written entirely in Python. It can execute a subset of Scheme's functionality, including primitive expressions, user-defined procedures, and special forms.

technologies used:

Python, Read-Eval-Print Loops


UNIT CONVERTER

A unit conversion tool that supports conversions between SI and imperial units in three different unit categories: mass, length, and temperature. Makes use of Tkinter, a GUI builder library for Python.

technologies used:

Python, Tkinter
